sources.title: Littlewood JT et al. 1988 — Red wine as a cause of migraine (Lancet)
Onderwater GLJ et al. 2019 — Alcoholic beverages as trigger factor (Eur J Neurol)
Devi A, Waterhouse AL et al. 2023 — Inhibition of ALDH2 by quercetin glucuronide (Sci Rep)
Hindiyeh NA et al. 2020 — Diet and Nutrition in Migraine (Headache)

note.nl: RCT (Littlewood 1988, n=11): migraine bij 9/11 gevoelige patiënten na rode wijn; 0/8 na vodka. Zelf-rapportage overschat (~78% vs ~9% objectief consistent). Mechanisme: quercetine-3-glucuronide remt ALDH2, acetaldehyde stapelt op.
note.en: RCT (Littlewood 1988, n=11): migraine in 9/11 sensitive patients after red wine; 0/8 after vodka. Self-reporting overestimates trigger (~78% vs ~9% objectively consistent). Mechanism: quercetin-3-glucuronide inhibits ALDH2, causing acetaldehyde accumulation.

sources.title: Devi A, Waterhouse AL et al. 2023 — Inhibition of ALDH2 by quercetin glucuronide (Sci Rep) — rode wijn, extrapolatie naar port
Onderwater GLJ et al. 2019 — Alcoholic beverages as trigger factor (Eur J Neurol) — rode wijn, extrapolatie naar port

note.nl: Geen directe studie beschikbaar. Extrapolatie van rode-wijn-pathway: port is versterkte rode wijn met vergelijkbare polyfenolen. Hogere ABV (~20%) maar kleinere portie (60 ml) compenseert; netto quercetine per drinkmoment niet gekwantificeerd.
note.en: No direct study available. Extrapolation from red wine pathway: port is a fortified red wine with comparable polyphenols. Higher ABV (~20%) but smaller serving (60 ml) partially compensates; net quercetin per drinking occasion not quantified.

gaps: nl-sherry-rood ontbreekt in dataset — toevoegen in volgende batch
